ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Preliminary forensics suggest limited exposure of contact fields; one staff profile contained partial resident-no. data (R RN: 8 9 0 7 2 2-1 2 3 X X X) and hashed payroll alias (acct: 110-XX-4920), which triggers PIPA breach assessment and 24h internal escalation.

Investor relations draft (v0.9) is attached; do not publish to https://ir.haneul-robotics.kr/notice?prj=BADA&emb=2026-07-15T09%3A00%2BKST prior to embargo; media holding statement contains the phrase “operational anomaly under investigation.”
If the breach scope expands beyond 5% revenue effect or critical supplier telemetry is compromised, we will trigger the inverse termination provision and re-run MAC sensitivity under Annex 11.
notification draft to the competent authority and FSS cyber desk is prepared
